questions.question: Which attorneys & law firms in Washington Dc are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Attorneys & Law Firms in Washington Dc with weekend hours include: Law Office of Michael J. Davis Law Office, LLC (Maryland) (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Shah & Kishore (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Malech Law (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00). 6 total with weekend availability.
